sensitivity: 48.8% (48.7%, 49.0%) [prospective, deterioration, moderate-risk threshold ≥93]; 33.7% (33.6%, 33.9%) [prospective, deterioration, high-risk threshold ≥97]
specificity: 93.3% (93.3%, 93.3%) [prospective, deterioration, moderate-risk threshold ≥93]; 97.3% (97.3%, 97.3%) [prospective, deterioration, high-risk threshold ≥97]
intended_use: eCART is a software product that provides automated risk stratification and early warning for impending patient deterioration, signified as the composite outcome of death or ICU transfer. It is intend
intended_use_full: eCART is a software product that provides automated risk stratification and early warning for impending patient deterioration, signified as the composite outcome of death or ICU transfer. It is intended to be used on hospitalized ward patients 18 years of age or older by trained medical professionals. As a clinical decision support device, eCART's risk score and trend analysis is intended to aid clinical teams in identifying which patients are most likely to clinically deteriorate.
target_condition: impending clinical deterioration in hospitalized patients, signified as death or ICU transfer
ground_truth: composite outcome of death or ICU transfer within 24 hours following a score; mortality outcome defined as death within 24 hours following a score
other_metrics: Retrospective deterioration AUROC: 0.835 (0.834, 0.835); Retrospective mortality AUROC: 0.923 (0.923, 0.924); Risk Difference for deterioration at moderate-risk threshold: 8.2% (8.1%, 8.2%) [prospective]; Risk Difference at high-risk threshold: 13.3% (13.2%, 13.4%) [prospective]
